chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.D-44 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 13-02-2024 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Chandio, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G. ***** Applicant has challenged the order dated 21.11.2023, passed by learned Judge, ATC-1, Sukkur on an application of the applicant seeking release from jail purportedly after completion of his sentence period. We have seen the order as well as jail roll. Jail Roll depicts that substantive imprisonment, the applicant has already suffered and he is in jail for want of payment of fine of Rs.3,25,000/-. According to judgment, in lieu of fine, applicant has to suffer four years imprisonment. Out of four years, the applicant has already suffered 02- years and his remaining portion of sentence is 02-years and 03- months. Learned counsel for applicant has admitted that applicant has not paid the fine amount. Therefore, we find no illegality in the impugned order and this Crl. Misc. Application is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
